outline.caption: VASCO Assistant Pro simplifies VA GIBill student veteran certifications, compliance, and reporting. Streamline your workload, support your student veterans, and make data-driven decisions. Learn more and sign up for a demo at https://aimilitaryservices.com/blog/vasco-assistant-pro

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others.
